package rulecoverage

func NegativeDefaultTransactionEnabledForBulkCreate() string {
    ruleID := "default_transaction_enabled_for_bulk_create"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Bulk creates performed with GORM default transaction enabled \u2014 SkipDefaultTransaction improves throughput."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
